response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial AI infrastructure with compliance and real-time credit risk systems as required.
strengths: Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at Acme Software
Proven track record in event-driven systems and distributed architecture via open-source GIS platform and microservices work
Strong engineering culture practices including TDD, CI/CD, and developer tooling contributions
concerns: No demonstrated leadership of 10+ person engineering teams or development of senior technical leadership layers
Lacks explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk modeling, or regulated AI deployment
No evidence of architecting model-agnostic, stateful multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning
